hypothesis: If the integrated workflow (thermodynamic screening via SISSO, React-CA simulation of reaction pathways, and pricing/feasibility analysis via ChemSpace and CrabNet) is effective, then Ca2SiO4 synthesis within the 800–1600°C Ca–Si–O–C–N–H–Al–B space using 36 commercially available reactants will achieve thermodynamic favorability for Ca2SiO4 formation and lower average reactant cost compared with non-optimized recipes.
